# opnsense_monit_alert (Data Source)

Reads a monit alert on OPNsense by its UUID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this alert is enabled.
- `events` (Set of String) Events to alert on (empty = all).
- `format` (String) Custom alert message format.
- `not_on` (Boolean) Invert the event filter (alert on all except selected).
- `recipient` (String) Email recipient.
- `reminder` (Number) Reminder interval in cycles (0 = unset).
